appmesh.route.grpcretrypolicy.GrpcRetryE.Docs: Specify at least one of the valid values.

appmesh.route.grpcretrypolicy.HttpRetryE.Docs: Specify at least one of the following values.  + **server-error** – HTTP status codes 500, 501, 502, 503, 504, 505, 506, 507, 508, 510, and 511+ **gateway-error** – HTTP status codes 502, 503, and 504+ **client-error** – HTTP status code 409+ **stream-error** – Retry on refused stream

appmesh.route.grpcretrypolicy.MaxRetries.Docs: The maximum number of retry attempts.

appmesh.route.grpcretrypolicy.PerRetryTi.Docs: The timeout for each retry attempt.

appmesh.route.grpcretrypolicy.TcpRetryEv.Docs: Specify a valid value. The event occurs before any processing of a request has started and is encountered when the upstream is temporarily or permanently unavailable.
